shots.title: Initiative types, specialist selection, state machine

bunker_locations: Initiative state machine requires careful transition validation — invalid transitions must be caught before file I/O
Specialist selection uses word-boundary matching — simple substring match would over-match (e.g., 'data' matching 'database')
yardage_book_updates: src/core/initiative.ts is the canonical initiative orchestration module — types, state machine, specialist selection, file I/O with mkdir-based locking
Initiative phases: pending → planning → plan_review → executing → scoring → pr_review → complete
Specialist roles (ml-engineer, database, ux-designer) are in src/core/roles.ts alongside existing role definitions
course_management_notes: Initiative orchestration scope pivoted from roadmap's Loop Foundation plan — review gate system prioritized for sprint quality
67 tests cover specialist selection edge cases (word boundary, multi-specialist, tie-breaking, fallback), state machine transitions, file I/O roundtrip, and CLI subcommands
mkdir-based locking pattern (.slope/.initiative.lock) chosen for simplicity over advisory file locks
